Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: Jennifer Brooks has spent her life answering the call to serve. From flying Blackhawk helicopters on multiple combat missions during two tours in Iraq to now serving as an Air Medical Pilot and first responder, her story is one of courage, sacrifice, and humility. In this episode of Storytellers, we join Jennifer in the field for a hunt that offers a rare moment to slow down, reflect, and honor a life dedicated to protecting others.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave: Women's Hunt"

Video.summary: On this weeks episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade and his daughter Asa take on the turkey woods together for the first time. As this is Asa's first time turkey hunting some quick pre hunt preparations are in order. Slade also was able to sit down with a good friend and registered forester to talk fire and the benefits of fire in land management. The next day, Asa and Slade were able to connect with a thundering tom as Asa punched her first ever turkey tag!
Video.title: "Asa's First Turkey!"

Video.summary: Rex meets up with “Mr Crappie” Wally Marshall in Texas. Wally takes Rex to one of his secret spots to put the hammer on the crappie. Not only did they catch crappie, but nice largemouth and some top tier coppernose bluegill.
Video.title: "Slab Daddy"

Video.summary: Shot through the neck on Fort Hood in Texas, Green Beret John Arroyo recounts coming face to face with his attacker and Jesus blinding his would be killer.
Video.title: "John Arroyo"

Video.summary: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Gold Star Youth Turkey"

Video.summary: An Honor No One Wants: A Gold Star Family is the immediate family member(s) of a fallen soldier who died while serving in a time of conflict. Ginger Gilbert-Ravella honors the memory her husband…American hero Troy Gilbert.
Video.title: "Ginger Gilbert-Ravella"

Video.summary: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Ozzie Lessinger take advantage of the springtime bite at South Seas Island resort.
Video.title: "South Seas Springtime"

Video.summary: Nikki Boxler’s life in Update New York on her family farm raising cattle and producing maple syrup is a few thousand miles from the hills of New Mexico. We’ll take a look into Nikki’s life back home and then follow along as she visits the small town of Quemado and its bustling population of 228, while she pursues bugling elk with her favorite Winchester in hand. We’ll also head to Missouri and Texas to chase whitetails with Chris Keefer and Paul Sawyer.
Video.title: “New Mexico Magic”

Video.summary: We set out to tell the tale of Marion - and his legendary Mack’s Prairie Wings, smack dab in the middle of the world famous Stuttgart, Arkansas - the land of ducks and rice. Get an inside look at a man that many consider to be larger than life, from those that knew him best, like his cousin and fellow hell raiser, Bud McCollum. We’ll even hear a story or two from Milton Stovesand, an 81 year old former waterfowl guide and Mack’s employee who actually guided John Olin a time or two, and ran the timber holes with Marion. It’s timber holes and tall tales. It’s cups of coffee and cupped up wings. It’s partners in business, and partners in potholes and it’s pure Arkansas...just like Marion.
Video.title: “The Legend of Stuttgart”

Video.summary: It’s been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the world’s best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell. - GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Six Decades Of Dominance"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: Meet Captain Lionel James — a respected Destin, Florida guide known for his upbeat personality, strong community ties, and love for fitness when he’s not on the water.
Video.title: "Lionel James"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve start the season with Capt. Scott Stoky chasing Islamorada Tunas and Mahis offshore out of Plantation Boat Mart.
Video.title: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Image.alt: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve catch a mixed bag bottom fishing off of Islamorada with Captain Scott Stoky.
Video.title: "Islamorada Mixed Bag"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve go yellow tailing out of Hawks Cay for a limit of tasty yellowtail snapper and Steve picks a battle with a big lemon shark.
Video.title: "Yellowtails And Lemons At Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve bounce around the reefs out of Hawks Cay catching a wide variety of reef dwellers.
Video.title: "Reef Fishing Out Of Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve take their brand new Invincible 36’ out of Plantation Boat Mart to fly the kites for some early season sailfishing.
Video.title: "Sailfish Season"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve make a big run from Plantation Boat Mart in the Invincible 36’ into the green Gulf waters to fill the Yeti cooler and battle with some seas monsters.
Video.title: "Into The Green"

Video.summary: On this episode, Capt. Danny joins his brother Nick for a day of fishing for redfish in some of their local waters, but in a tournament mindset. Tune in to see how the Allen’s go about strategizing a day of tournament fishing in hopes of getting some bragging rights and a check!
Video.title: "Tournament Trail"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team is taking - the Marine Surplus Console for the Aqua sport project and giving it a much needed face lift. They meet the team at Boat Outfitters to find an acrylic covering board to fit the console and cover the pre existing holes. They then head over to meet with crew at AwlGrip to get some ideas on color matching the console with the Aqua sport.
Video.title: Essentials - "Refit on a Surplus Console"

Video.summary: Last summer Cam Rhoden and his family were told that he may never breath on his own again, much less walk. After meeting David Blanton during his rehab at the Shepherd Center, they made plans to go on a Georgia turkey hunt. Cam is not only walking - he’s walking to a Georgia Gobbler!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "A Walk To Remember"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared and Father-Son duo Captain’s Hunter & Chris Barron have Sailfish in their sights.
Video.title: "Like Father Like Son"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Parker, South Dakota for a European pheasant hunt at Wings of Valor Lodge! The South Dakota DAV chapter is onsite for a great day of hunting and fellowship. We also honor Missoula Scheels Hometown Hero, Anton Johnson!
Video.title: "Wings of Valor"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton pulls two Osceola Longbeards in on a string as he kicks off the 2025 turkey season in South Florida.
Video.title: "Coming In Hot"

Video.summary: Guadalajara’s heritage runs deep. On the DIRT crew’s latest adventure, they explored the region’s rich history from volcanic highlands to secret surf coves. Chefs Xrysw Ruelas and Óscar Segundo sent Josh and co. to load up on locally grown coffee, spearfish between catching waves, and follow freshly harvested agave on its journey to becoming tequila. After learning the ropes of Mexico’s national sport, Charreria, and hitting up a Lucha Libre match, all the local flavors came together in a feast backed by thousands of years of tradition. There really is something special in the soil here.
Video.title: DIRT - "Harvesting Tequila, Surfing Secret Coves & Tasting Legendary Mexican Flavors"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Harvesting Tequila, Surfing Secret Coves & Tasting Legendary Mexican Flavors"
DIRT - "Harvesting Tequila, Surfing Secret Coves & Tasting Legendary Mexican Flavors"
DIRT - "Harvesting Tequila, Surfing Secret Coves & Tasting Legendary Mexican Flavors"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.
Video.title: "LA Tuna Pt 2"

Video.summary: Sailfish, tuna, macks, and more as Nick joins Captain Jack Walker to rip up the pelagics offshore in Key West.
Video.title: "Key West Slamboree"

Video.summary: Orange Lake is a bass angler's paradise, known for its enormous trophy bass. On this episode of Local Lines TV, we dive into these rich waters to uncover the secrets of catching these giants. Get ready for thrilling action and expert tips from Brandon Branch and Trevor Fitzgerald.
Video.title: "Discovering Orange Lake"

Video.summary: Qualifier 3 finds the tour anglers headed to the St. Lawrence River out of Brockville, Ontario.
Video.title: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 3 - Brockville, Ontario"

Video.summary: Second leg in the slam is complete! Justin Webb killed his Rio in Texas. - Next stop - Tennessee for the Eastern.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Rio Dreams"

Video.summary: Roger Culpepper takes Sophia Mahlke and her dad Tom to kill her first longbeard. The guys and girl find the gobblers on roost in a beautiful Georgia hardwood bottom and make their move.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Georgia Opening Day"

Video.summary: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.
Video.title: "Member Hunt"

Video.summary: Over the years we have been able to hunt with a lot of amazing people. This episode takes us to Las Palmas ranch to hunt with Payton Angelle. Payton was awarded this hunt from the amazing people over at Sky High for kids.
Video.title: "Las Palmas"

Video.summary: Opening day in Mississippi has arrived and Slade is taking full advantage of it! With the weather not cooperating Slade and Zeb stumble into a turkey hunt they won't soon forget. Two days later, the hot streak continues with Slade connecting on another turkey on an 83 acre property he has for sale! Also, Slade gives some tips and his ideas on small acreage hunting, and how it can be just as lucrative as big tracks of land!
Video.title: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"

Image.alt: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
"Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
"Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"

Video.summary: The boys are on the Raven in Missouri trying to plant 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days before heading out west to kick off the hunting season.
Video.title: "50 Acres In 5 Days"

Video.summary: The conditions are just right and the guys have some of the best turkey hunting encounters of the season.
Video.title: "We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"

Image.alt: "We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"
"We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"
"We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"

Video.summary: Phillip and Drake hunt with friends Michael and Adam Reinbott during the opening week of Turkey Season in Tennessee. The gobblers are on fire and putting on a show.
Video.title: "3 Turkeys In 2 Days | Tennessee Opener" (Broke)

Video.summary: JP takes his largemouth flipping technique to the mangroves of Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Flipping the Salt"

Video.summary: While up in Alaska, the crew caught more fish than we had time to show so here's another look at some of the fish that were caught on the Alaskan trip.
Video.title: "Alaska Bits & Bites"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss and Captain James Hillman are heading out of Highland Park Fish Camp in Deland, Florida, looking for largemouth bass.
Video.title: “Rustic Retreat”

Video.summary: Josh and his wife Anna celebrate the first day of summer by taking their daughters out for a fun-filled day on the water.
Video.title: "Family Day"

Video.summary: The Green Way team continue their African journey with hunts for both the majestic Kudu and elusive Golden Wildebeest. The experience comes full circle when the meat from these animals is donated to local schoolchildren, who receive not only fresh meals but also school supplies and sweets that light up the village.
Video.title: "Africa Part 2"

Video.summary: Mark continues his quest in Croatia, and on the third day, they decide to venture to the coast where he will pursue his hunt on one of the numerous islands that permit hunting (Dugi Otok Island). Armed - with his trusted Gunwerks 7LRM Rifle, Mark prepares to stalk the diverse array of exotic animals inhabiting these islands, offering him a rich selection of prey to choose from.
Video.title: "Hunting In Croatia - Dugi Otok Island"

Video.summary: For Capt. Justin Leake, sight fishing the beach is one of the most productive, and FUN ways to fish. When that doesn’t work, Capt. Todd Jones suggests fishing an artificial reef, and as it turns out, that’s where dinner lives.
Video.title: "Beach For Fun Reef For Flavor"

Video.summary: Meredith McCord arrives in late spring and joins Capt. Justin Leake on the hunt for a fish she’s never caught before. Lo and behold, it’s a day fit for a king.
Video.title: "First Things First"

Video.summary: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester’s best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We’ll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.
Video.title: "Clays With Purpose"

Video.summary: Across the country, deer season to many Americans is a rite of passage. For generations, Winchester has been the trusted ammunition choice for hunters…and it’s been a decade since the game-changing Deer Season XP whitetail line was introduced. In this episode, we’ll celebrate the many successes by Team Winchester hunters in the field during whitetail and mule deer firearm seasons across the United States. - GUESTS: Melissa Bachman (Team Winchester) Mark Drury (Team Winchester) Nikki Boxler (Team Winchester) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester) Jason Gilbertson (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Decade Of Deer Season"

Video.summary: Ty and Andy have been hunting some Kansas ground that Andy has had permission on for years. Every year it seems to start of hot with struggles to follow but this year Andy finds success. Andy gets a bird to commit to the decoys before a coyote nearly ruins everything in this exciting turkey hunt.
Video.title: "Turkey Down After Coyote Nearly Ruins Everything! WILD HUNT!"

Image.alt: "Turkey Down After Coyote Nearly Ruins Everything! WILD HUNT!"
"Turkey Down After Coyote Nearly Ruins Everything! WILD HUNT!"
"Turkey Down After Coyote Nearly Ruins Everything! WILD HUNT!"

Video.summary: If you’ve ever heard, seen, or dreamed of the term van life, there is one man to thank for that, and his name is Foster Huntington. The filmmaker, photographer, and author has a storied career that includes the legendary book, "Home is Where You Park it". We met up with Foster (out on the road naturally) and he gave us a tour of his personal off-road camping rig he takes around the country.
Video.title: "How this Van Life Pioneer Set Up His Perfect Off-Grid Camper | Foster Huntington"

Image.alt: "How this Van Life Pioneer Set Up His Perfect Off-Grid Camper | Foster Huntington"
"How this Van Life Pioneer Set Up His Perfect Off-Grid Camper | Foster Huntington"
"How this Van Life Pioneer Set Up His Perfect Off-Grid Camper | Foster Huntington"

Video.summary: 2 down, 1 to go. Anthony Virga’s the next man up for a gobbler with Michael Pitts and Matt Garger in New York’s Adirondack Mountains.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Virga New York Kill"

Video.summary: We’re kicking off a special weekend at Legends Ranch in Bitely, Michigan — bringing together two groups connected by a shared respect for the outdoors. Legends Ranch has always stood for - strong conservation values, and when you combine that with the work being done by the SCI Foundation and Sables, it sets the tone for something bigger than just a hunt. Sables members are deeply involved in shaping the future of hunting — reaching into - classrooms, working with young people, collaborating with wildlife professionals, and engaging leaders at both the state and national level. Their efforts are centered on helping others understand wildlife diversity, the principles behind the North American Model of Wildlife Conservation, and the role hunting plays in maintaining - balance in the wild. They’re also helping keep the tradition alive — showing that hunting still has a strong place in today’s culture and communities. With that kind of purpose behind it, this weekend is about more than time in the field — it’s about continuing something that matters.
Video.title: "Sables"

Video.summary: Randy and Cody are wrapping things up on the Raven before bow season arrives in Missouri. Planting I-70 the plot where Randy killed one of his biggest Missouri bucks ever last year. Then Randy and Cody attempt to setup a new farm they are calling “The River Farm” they attempt to plant a food plot, bush hog, spray the plot, setup a new Titan blind, and setup a Hooyman dual perimeter fence all in one day before the sun goes down.
Video.title: "I-70 and The River Farm"

Video.summary: Tyler Jordan heads back to his college stomping grounds at Ole Miss to hunt with Athletic Director Keith Carter and William Jones. After a tough few days they were finally able to find some birds that were willing to work!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Ole Miss Double"

Video.summary: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin have 2 incredible late season hunts in South Dakota. A flock comes into the hen decoy and a Jake trying to breed the decoy drives the Toms insane!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David South Dakota"

Video.summary: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"
